_doc: LLM pools for BRAIN=optimize. EVERY pool is an OpenAI-compatible chat endpoint — so ANY provider works: just give base_url + api_key_env + model. Add xAI / OpenAI / Groq / DeepSeek / OpenRouter / a local mlx/ollama server by adding a pool here. `enclave init` (optimize) seeds this from your answers; edit it anytime to add/remove pools.
_routing_doc: route_brain.py runs Claude (the subscription — free at the margin) while its 5h/7d cap has headroom, tiered Opus(judgment)/Sonnet(mechanical). As the cap fills it shifts work to the CHEAPEST reachable pool below (by `cost`: free local → low → high), preferring `local` for privacy/$0; judgment work prefers a higher-cost pool, mechanical prefers the cheapest. Pools are pinged first and skipped if unreachable or missing a key — so it always degrades gracefully back to Claude.

cap._doc: Claude subscription utilization (5h or 7d, whichever higher). < soft: all on Claude. soft..hard: mechanical work leaves Claude. >= hard: everything leaves Claude (don't burn/wait on the cap).

review._doc: Routing for the review() primitive (review.py). The caller declares criticality + independence; THIS decides the judge. Free tiers are refused for review (measured 2026-07-20: free qwen scored 5.0/5 ADVANCE on all candidates — a rubber stamp; Opus/DeepSeek discriminated honestly at 2.2–3.0).

independent._doc: cross-family second opinion — a judge from the generator's own family agrees with the generator

local._doc: A local OpenAI-compatible server (mlx_lm on :8081, or ollama on :11434/v1). $0, private, no cap. Default = NVIDIA Nemotron-3 Nano (30B-A3B MoE, agentic tool-calling) on the host MLX bridge. Swap `model` for any tag the server serves; blank base_url/model = no local pool.

cheap._doc: A cheap remote pool. Example: OpenRouter gemini-flash. Swap base_url+model for any provider.

top._doc: A frontier remote pool for hard work when Claude's cap is exhausted.

nvidia._doc: NVIDIA NIM hosted endpoints (build.nvidia.com — OpenAI-compatible, free tier). Put NVIDIA_API_KEY in secrets/nvidia.env. Swap model for any build.nvidia.com id, e.g. nvidia/llama-3.3-nemotron-super-49b-v1 (stronger). Skipped automatically until the key is present.

_example_xai._doc: EXAMPLE of adding another provider — rename this key to enable (put XAI_API_KEY in secrets/xai.env).
